properties.full_description: Turnkey 5BR/4BA pool home in Azur Resort priced at $375,000. Fully furnished and rental-ready at closing with 1,671 heated sq ft (1,736 total). Private screened splash pool and 5-bedroom layout align with strong-performing short-term rental profiles in the Champions Gate/Davenport corridor. Comparable long-term rentals average approx. $2,800/month. Zoned for short-term rental use with Airbnb/VRBO flexibility. Gated resort-style community with clubhouse, pool, fitness center, and minutes to Disney, dining, shopping, and I-4 access. Ideal for cash investors seeking immediate income potential. Agents: If your buyer is comparing multiple units in Azur, note this property is competitively positioned relative to current and anticipated inventory. Encourage buyers to act accordingly.Financial projections are estimates only and not guaranteed. Buyer to conduct independent due diligence on HOA, rental performance, and operating costs.

Ideal as a vacation home, primary residence, or income-producing rental. Community amenities include a clubhouse, resort-style pool, fitness center, and recreation areas. Conveniently located near ChampionsGate golf courses, shopping, dining, and Orlando's world-famous attractions. subdivision name THE AZUR RESORT

properties.full_description: Turnkey Resort-Style Living Exceptional Condition Prime Investment Opportunity This beautifully maintained, move-in-ready home is in outstanding condition and offers the perfect blend of comfort, style, and income potential ideal as a primary residence, second home. From the moment you step inside, you'll notice the bright, open layout designed for modern living and effortless entertaining. The spacious living and dining areas flow seamlessly into a fully equipped kitchen with contemporary finishes, ample cabinetry, and everything needed for everyday living or hosting guests with ease. The home features multiple well-appointed bedrooms, offering privacy and flexibility for families, guests, or rental groups. Every space has been thoughtfully designed to maximize comfort, functionality, and appeal making it equally attractive to homeowners and vacation renters. Step outside to your private pool and outdoor living area, perfect for enjoying Florida's sunshine year-round. Whether relaxing after a day at the parks or entertaining friends and family, this outdoor space is a true highlight. Located just minutes from Walt Disney World, major attractions, shopping, dining, and entertainment, this property sits in a high-demand area with strong rental performance and long-term growth potential. Owners and guests also enjoy access to The Azur Resort amenities, enhancing both lifestyle value and rental appeal. Immaculately cared for and truly turnkey, this home stands out for its condition, location, and versatility. Properties like this offering both quality living and proven short-term rental appeal are in high demand. Whether you're looking to live, invest, or do both, this is a rare opportunity you don't want to miss.

properties.full_description: Stunning townhome located in the highly desirable Davenport/Disney area. This spacious home features an open-concept layout with modern finishes, a bright kitchen with ample cabinetry and counter space, and generously sized bedrooms, including multiple en-suites,ideal for both family living and guests. The property also offers a private covered pool, perfect for year-round enjoyment. Never lived in and ideal for first-time owners, this home provides the rare opportunity to own a brand-new construction without the wait. Situated in a resort-style community offering amenities such as a clubhouse, pool, and fitness center. Conveniently located just minutes from Disney parks, and a short drive to International Drive and Universal Studios, with easy access to I-4. Surrounded by numerous grocery stores, restaurants, shopping, and entertainment, all just minutes away. Perfect as a primary residence, second home, or investment property.

properties.full_description: Under contract-accepting backup offers. Welcome to this beautifully presented 5-bedroom, fully furnished end-unit townhome located in the highly sought-after Solterra Resort. Positioned on a premium end lot, this property benefits from additional privacy, enhanced natural light, and an overall more spacious feel compared to interior units. This home is currently on the short-term vacation rental program, offering an excellent opportunity for investors seeking immediate income potential or buyers looking for a second home with strong rental appeal. The property is being sold fully furnished and turnkey, allowing for a seamless transition for new ownership. Inside, the home features a well-designed open floor plan with a modern kitchen, spacious living and dining areas, and comfortably appointed bedrooms ideal for accommodating larger groups and families. The layout is perfectly suited for the vacation rental market, maximizing both guest experience and occupancy potential. Located within Solterra Resort, one of Central Florida's premier gated vacation communities, owners and guests enjoy access to world-class amenities including a resort-style pool with lazy river, clubhouse, fitness center, tennis courts, and more. The community's proximity to Walt Disney World, major attractions, shopping, and dining makes it a consistently high-demand location for vacationers. Whether you are looking to expand your investment portfolio or secure a vacation home in one of Orlando's top-performing resort communities, this property represents an outstanding opportunity.

properties.full_description: Check out this amazing townhouse with 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms and 1 half bathroom, offering a stunning lake view! This property is an excellent investment opportunity, as it's zoned for both long-term and short-term rentals. Whether you're looking for a place to live or a smart investment, this is the perfect choice! Located near Posner Park in Davenport, you'll be close to movie theaters, shopping centers, restaurants, and just minutes away from the theme parks. The home features granite countertops, tray ceiling in the primary bedroom, ceramic tile floors and walls in the bathrooms, and a beautiful setting to enjoy the sunrise over the lake right from your backyard. Don't miss this unique opportunity to combine comfort, location, and great investment potential!

properties.full_description: Welcome! This inviting 4-bedroom, 2-bathroom, first floor corner unit presents a thoughtfully designed space, with an open layout, spacious bedrooms, and a private, covered patio, creating a warm atmosphere ready for any occasion. The secure gated entrance offers peace of mind, while the community pool, clubhouse, fitness center, and volleyball court provide daily enjoyment. Cable TV is also included with the monthly dues. The location offers outstanding convenience with immediate proximity to Publix, Aldi, and numerous shopping centers boasting daily essentials, primary services, restaurants, shopping, and entertainment for easy day-to-day living. Whether you are headed to Disney, Universal, or beyond, easy access to major roads and highways ensures effortless travel throughout Central Florida. This welcoming property and community combine comfortable living, with attractive community features, and exceptional accessibility, culminating in an ideal option for those seeking both relaxation and recreation. Don't let this opportunity slip away, schedule your private showing today and experience the perfect blend of comfort and convenience that awaits you.

properties.full_description: Discover resort-style living at its finest in this stunning 5-bedroom, 4-bath end-unit townhome nestled in the sought-after Paradise Palms Resort in Kissimmee, Florida. Whether you're looking for the perfect vacation retreat or a savvy short-term rental investment, this property checks every box. Step inside and be impressed by the upgraded luxury vinyl plank flooring throughout the main living areas, complemented by elegant ceramic tile in all wet areas - combining beauty with easy maintenance. The open, airy layout of this desirable end unit means extra windows and added privacy you won't find in interior units. Entertain and unwind in style with your own private screened patio and splash pool - the perfect spot to cool off after a day at the parks. The 5th bedroom has been thoughtfully converted into a fun-filled game room, giving guests of all ages a dedicated space to play and relax. Spacious bathrooms throughout ensure everyone has room to recharge in comfort. Head outside and enjoy the short stroll to the resort's world-class clubhouse and amenities, including pools, fitness facilities, and more. Rest easy knowing you're tucked behind the security of a guard-gated entrance, with designated parking right at your door. The classic tile roof adds curb appeal and long-lasting durability. Paradise Palms Resort is ideally located just minutes from Walt Disney World, Universal Studios, and all the magic that Central Florida brings you.

properties.full_description: Welcome to this stunning 5-bedroom, 4-bathroom townhome in the highly desirable Paradise Palms Resort in Kissimmee, just minutes from Disney and Orlando's top attractions. This beautifully updated home features a modern open-concept layout with sleek, contemporary flooring throughout the main living areas and a fully equipped kitchen boasting granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, and a breakfast bar perfect for casual dining or entertaining. The home is fully furnished and thoughtfully designed with two spacious primary suites, one on each level, offering privacy and flexibility for guests or extended family. Each bedroom is tastefully decorated with a clean, modern aesthetic and ample storage. Step outside to your private screened-in lanai with a heated splash pool, ideal for relaxing after a day at the parks or enjoying Florida's year-round sunshine. Located in the gated Paradise Palms Resort, residents and guests enjoy access to world-class amenities including a resort-style pool, spa, fitness center, movie theater, tennis courts, arcade, and clubhouse with concierge services. Whether you're looking for a vacation rental investment, a second home, or a primary residence, this townhome offers the perfect blend of modern comfort, style, and unbeatable location.

Welcome to Regal Palms Resort, where every day feels like a vacation-and where you also have the opportunity to own a high-performing investment property ideal for short-term rentals. This beautifully updated 4-bedroom, 3-bathroom two-story condo comes fully furnished with stylish, high-quality furniture and tasteful decor. Major updates include a new HVAC system (2022), new water heater (2022), and fresh interior paint (2022). Enjoy a modern kitchen with brand-new stainless steel appliances (refrigerator and microwave, 2024), an open-concept floor plan combining kitchen, dining, and living spaces, soaring ceilings, ample storage, and serene conservation views. One of the bedrooms is conveniently located on the first floor and includes its own full bath and optional private entrance perfect for added flexibility or rental potential. * Resort Features Include: - 24-hour front desk assistance - On-site restaurant and tiki bar - Water park with lazy river & zero-entry pool - Full-service spa and fitness center - 4 BBQ areas and 2 playgrounds - Volleyball courts, pub & grill, arcade, ice cream shop - Adjacent to Highlands Reserve Golf Club - Minutes to Disney, Universal, Publix, shopping, and dining Nestled in lush tropical landscaping, enjoy peaceful moments on your screened-in lanai or step into full vacation mode without ever leaving the resort. Whether you're looking for your next getaway spot or a fully booked income-generating property, this is the one. Schedule your private showing today-this opportunity won't last!
